nodes.name: Stripe Webhook (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED — configure Stripe Dashboard → Developers → Webhooks to POST to this URL. Copy the signing secret into .env as STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET before activation. See OPERATIONS_HANDBOOK §21 for the full activation sequence.

nodes.name: Verify Signature
nodes.notes: TODO: Set STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET in .env and n8n environment. Until then, this node treats every event as unverified and the downstream IF routes to the scan_errors logger.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: null, node_name: 'stripe_webhook_unverified', error_code: 'STRIPE_WEBHOOK_UNVERIFIED', error_message: 'Signature verification failed for event ' + ($json.event_id || 'unknown'), created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ stripe_event_id: $json.event_id, event_type: $json.event_type, payload: $json.payload, processed: false, received_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stripe_subscription_id: $json.stripe_subscription_id || null, subscription_status: $json.status || null, next_billing_date: $json.next_billing_date || null, trial_ends_at: $json.trial_end || null, last_payment_amount: $json.amount_paid || null, last_payment_at: $json.paid_at || null }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: null, node_name: 'stripe_invoice_payment_failed', error_code: 'STRIPE_PAYMENT_FAILED', error_message: 'Stripe customer ' + ($json.stripe_customer_id || 'unknown') + ' payment failed for subscription ' + ($json.stripe_subscription_id || 'unknown'), created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ processed: true, processed_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
